title: Susan's Cheesecake Supreme
description: A classic tall, creamy cheesecake on a graham cracker crust, baked with sour cream and topped with cherry pie filling.
instructions: Combine the crumbs, 3 tablespoons sugar, and margarine; press onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
Combine the cream cheese, 1 cup sugar, and flour, mixing at medium speed on an electric mixer until well blended.
Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
Blend in the sour cream and vanilla; pour over the crust.
Reduce the temperature to 250°F; continue baking for 1 hour.
Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan; cool before removing the rim of the pan.
Top with the pie filling just before serving.

notes.label: Variation
notes.text: Substitute 1½ cups finely chopped nuts and 2 tablespoons sugar for the graham cracker crumbs and sugar.
